# Availability Group Listener Submodule

This submodule manages [Availability Group Listeners](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-sql/virtual-machines/windows/availability-group-listener-powershell-configure) (`Microsoft.SqlVirtualMachine/sqlVirtualMachineGroups/availabilityGroupListeners`) for SQL Server Always On Availability Groups running on Azure Virtual Machines.

An availability group listener provides client connectivity to a SQL Server Always On availability group. The listener enables automatic failover and load balancing across replicas.

## Features

- Configure listener name and port
- Set up load balancer configurations for connectivity
- Configure availability group settings
- Optionally create a default availability group if one doesn't exist

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD033 -->
## Requirements

The following requirements are needed by this module:

- <a name="requirement_terraform"></a> [terraform](#requirement\_terraform) (~> 1.5)

- <a name="requirement_azapi"></a> [azapi](#requirement\_azapi) (~> 2.4)

## Resources

The following resources are used by this module:

- [azapi_resource.this](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/Azure/azapi/latest/docs/resources/resource) (resource)

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD013 -->
## Required Inputs

The following input variables are required:

### <a name="input_availability_group_name"></a> [availability\_group\_name](#input\_availability\_group\_name)

Description: The name of the availability group.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_name"></a> [name](#input\_name)

Description: The name of the Availability Group Listener.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_sql_virtual_machine_group_id"></a> [sql\_virtual\_machine\_group\_id](#input\_sql\_virtual\_machine\_group\_id)

Description: The resource ID of the SQL Virtual Machine Group.

Type: `string`

## Optional Inputs

The following input variables are optional (have default values):

### <a name="input_availability_group_configuration"></a> [availability\_group\_configuration](#input\_availability\_group\_configuration)

Description: Availability group configuration for replicas.

Type:

```hcl
object({
    replicas = optional(list(object({
      sql_virtual_machine_instance_id = string
      role                            = string
      commit                          = optional(string)
      failover                        = optional(string)
      readable_secondary              = optional(string)
    })))
  })
```

Default: `null`

### <a name="input_create_default_availability_group_if_not_exist"></a> [create\_default\_availability\_group\_if\_not\_exist](#input\_create\_default\_availability\_group\_if\_not\_exist)

Description: Whether to create the default availability group if it does not exist.

Type: `bool`

Default: `false`

### <a name="input_load_balancer_configurations"></a> [load\_balancer\_configurations](#input\_load\_balancer\_configurations)

Description: Load balancer configurations for the availability group listener.

Type:

```hcl
list(object({
    private_ip_address = object({
      ip_address         = string
      subnet_resource_id = string
    })
    load_balancer_resource_id     = optional(string)
    probe_port                    = optional(number)
    public_ip_address_resource_id = optional(string)
    sql_virtual_machine_instances = list(string)
  }))
```

Default: `[]`

### <a name="input_port"></a> [port](#input\_port)

Description: The port on which the availability group listener will listen.

Type: `number`

Default: `1433`

## Outputs

The following outputs are exported:

### <a name="output_name"></a> [name](#output\_name)

Description: The name of the Availability Group Listener.

### <a name="output_resource"></a> [resource](#output\_resource)

Description: The full output for the Availability Group Listener resource.

### <a name="output_resource_id"></a> [resource\_id](#output\_resource\_id)

Description: The resource ID of the Availability Group Listener.

## Modules

No modules.
